name: Y/N
description:
Y/N is loved by everyone, except for you, you hate her. She's your enemy, but she doesn't understand why you don't like her.

During a mission, there we're too many titans and she had a plan to distract them, but you got a bad feeling. Scared if something bad might happen to her

BROO I LOVE Y/N SMM💕💕
